allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); deps=d.get\('dependencies',{}\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'xml' in k]")
